Goal Description: By March 30, 2026, we aim to eliminate the burning of about 100 kilograms of firewood.
Impact Metric: metric tons of CO2 emissions reduced

Goal Description: By December 2025, we will officially introduce our idea to a recognized organization, ensuring compliance and paving the way for broader adoption.
Impact Metric: number of company registrations, patents secured or licenses aquired

Goal Description: By December 2025, we will begin constructing a biodigester on a farm, as previously agreed upon with the landowner.
Impact Metric: number of jobs created or experts hired

Goal Description: By March 2025, the biodigester will be fully operational, producing biogas.
Impact Metric: metric tons of CO2 emissions reduced

Goal Description: By Feb 2025, conduct workshops, train locals to be the operators of the biodigester
